benefits.description: Complete healing of chronic idiopathic duodenal ulcer confirmed by endoscopy with imaging showing pink, healthy stomach lining with no wounds
Felt better within 2-3 days of switching to oral arginine salt BPC-157; much better after a few weeks

protocol_notes: Initial protocol: acetate salt BPC-157 injected subcutaneously for ~2 months with no noticeable effect. Later switched to arginine salt BPC-157 taken orally, which produced rapid improvement. Arginine salt described as 'stabilized' to resist heat, acid, and UV. Also taking vitamins. Concurrent medication: omeprazole initially, then switched to Nexium (esomeprazole) at maximum dose 40mg daily for 2+ years prior to peptide intervention. Continued on 40mg Nexium throughout peptide treatment. Originally hired a biohacking coach who recommended the initial acetate salt protocol and did not understand the distinction between acetate and arginine salt formulations.
